---
id: execute-device-trait
title: "控制设备 / 设备更换房间 / 设备改名"
description: "通过 trait 执行设备控制，包括："
sidebar_label: "控制设备 / 设备更换房间 / 设备改名"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"控制设备 / 设备更换房间 / 设备改名"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/trait/execute"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



通过 trait 执行设备控制，包括：
- 控制设备属性（如开关、温度等）
- 设备更换房间（functionCode=EndpointLabel, traitCode=EndpointRoom）
- 设备改名（functionCode=EndpointLabel, traitCode=EndpointName）


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["data"],"properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","traitCode","value"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点 ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码，如：\n- Output（开关控制）\n- EndpointLabel（设备改名/更换房间）\n"},"traitCode":{"type":"string","description":"属性编码，如：\n- OnOff（开关）\n- EndpointRoom（设备所在房间）\n- EndpointName（设备名称）\n"},"value":{"description":"要设置的值（推荐按同级 parameter.type 选择值类型）","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"}},"title":"TraitExecuteItem"}}},"title":"TraitExecuteRequest"},"examples":{"executeOnOff":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"123456","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCode":"OnOff","value":true}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"成功（data 中返回执行失败的条目）","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息
